meta.title: Luo Qingyou x Luo Arisu | Character Project

ui.reference_note: The page uses reference crops and stable placeholders first. Finished transparent PNG assets will replace their slots automatically.
ui.site_footer: HTML / CSS / asset workflow generated from structured data. Public pages are Chinese-first with an English mirror and locale separation.
ui.knowledge_pages_summary: Each page keeps source archive anchors and migration status so later agents can verify what moved where.

home.title: Luo Qingyou x Luo Arisu
home.subtitle: Build the website as a stable display window first, then regenerate clothing, accessories, expressions, and props as transparent reusable assets.
home.summary: This stage separates the original full-sheet images into structured web pages and an asset pipeline. HTML/CSS owns text, frames, palettes, and labels; generated images own characters, outfits, accessories, and props.

theme_layers.name: Surface
theme_layers.text: The sisters prepare a Rabbit Hole Tea Party through outfits, journals, photography, old libraries, invitations, and small props.

theme_layers.name: Character
theme_layers.text: Qingyou protects dreams through order; Arisu searches for dreams through exploration. Their complementarity becomes conflict and then co-creation.

theme_layers.name: Core
theme_layers.text: AIGC gradually amplifies anxieties about replacement, perfect dreams, and outsourced choices. The ending returns tools to their proper place while people keep direction, judgment, and relationships.

pipeline_steps: Build the index page and two HTML character sheets first.
Crop references from the existing full character sheets into strict character folders.
Regenerate textless, borderless, solid-background versions from those crops.
Remove the chroma key locally to produce transparent PNG assets and log them in CSV.
Replace page placeholders with transparent assets while the web layer keeps final typography and labels.
home.story_surface: The sisters prepare a Rabbit Hole Tea Party together.
home.story_summary: The surface is a sweet daily-life tea party project. The middle layer is order versus disorder. The deep layer reflects on value, companionship, advice, and generated content in the AIGC era.

acts.title: Act 1: Leave a Page for the Dream
acts.text: Arisu proposes a tea party for people who get lost. Qingyou writes it into her journal.

acts.title: Act 2: The Dream Becomes Faster
acts.text: Classmates generate posters and plans with AI. Qingyou feels displaced, while Arisu is drawn to perfect Alice imagery.

acts.title: Act 3: Even Getting Lost Is Scheduled
acts.text: Qingyou over-optimizes the invitation and process. Arisu feels her strange sentences have been flattened.

acts.title: Act 4: Choose the Door Again
acts.text: Both admit their fears and reassign AI to repetitive work while they keep direction and relationships.

acts.title: Finale: An Imperfect Tea Party
acts.text: Rain, lateness, soft-focus photos, and blank journal space make the day truly theirs.

home.content_map_summary: The current index is a lightweight display hub. The long first-version content is preserved in the full archive and structured data.

content_map_groups.text: Second-level pages split from the old archive with skeletons, summaries, and source anchors first.

qingyou.name: Luo Qingyou
qingyou.role: Classic Lolita | Planner | Archivist | Gentle Older Sister
qingyou.short: A person who protects dreams through order.
qingyou.quote: Then let us give this dream a date.
qingyou.support_quote: I will prepare the tea, and the way back.
visual: Old street, tea party, window light
daily: Arrives early and carries clips, tape, notes, and bandages.
Checks the light before taking photos.
Leaves one page for inspiration and one column for accidents.
Opens her journal before answering Arisu's new ideas.
qingyou.conflict: She treats doing things well as proof of value, so generative tools shake her confidence.
qingyou.growth: She learns to use tools for repeated work while keeping judgment, care, and relationships in her own hands.

arisu.name: Luo Arisu
arisu.role: JK Lolita | Alice Motif | Explorer | Doorway to Dreams
arisu.short: A person who searches for dreams through disorder.
arisu.quote: Sister, do you feel like this door is different today?
arisu.support_quote: The key is still here, so the door must be here too.
visual: Key necklace, rabbit charm, pocket watch
School hallway, old library, secret door
daily: Her bag charms make a small sound when she walks.
Names keys, rabbit dolls, and music boxes.
When anxious, she takes detours and touches her key necklace.
arisu.conflict: She believes in other possibilities but fears opening the door and finding reality less beautiful than imagination.
arisu.growth: She stops waiting for the dream to appear and starts opening the door herself.
